preconditions: createNoveltyReserve tracks the γ-decayed recent newcomer rate (clustered: signal log-loss < constant)
the long-run floor holds the reserve up after a stretch (anchored mass >> naive mass at a stretch→burst transition)
absolute continuity without a constant (mass > 0 after a long confirmation stretch)
the reserve is modality-blind (text-like ids ≡ pitch-like ids)
control: no clustered-sized win on iid (memoryless) novelty — a reserve that beats the constant on iid is reacting to recency-noise, not structure, and fails the lock
readingAt parity: the default path uses NOVELTY_RESERVE (byte-identical); opts.signalReserve moves the reserve
